use_codes.desc: LOTEMAX OPHTHALMIC SUSPENSION IS INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF STEROID RESPONSIVE CONDITIONS OF THE PALPEBRAL BULBAR CONJUNCTIVA, CORNEA AND ANTERIOR SEGMENT OF THE GLOBE.
